Article.ArticleTitle: Appraisal of "Preventing pulmonary complications after laparoscopic colorectal surgery: a lung-protective protocol vs. standard care".

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: From the Department of Anesthesiology and Intensive Care Medicine, Helios Klinikum Schleswig (ND), and Department of Anesthesiology and Intensive Care Medicine, Helios Klinikum Schleswig, Schleswig, Schleswig-Holstein, Germany (MG).

Reference.Citation: Yan T, Li H, Sun Y, et al. Preventing pulmonary complications after laparoscopic colorectal surgery: a lung-protective protocol vs. standard care. Eur J Anaesthesiol 2025; 42:826–839.
Miskovic A, Lumb AB. Postoperative pulmonary complications. Br J Anaesth 2017; 118:317–334.

Determann RM, Millo JL, Waddy S, et al. Plasma levels of soluble receptor for advanced glycation end products and lung epithelial injury in ventilator-induced lung injury. Intensive Care Med 2006; 32:1710–1717.

de Jong A, Molinari N, Pouzeratte Y, et al. Decreased postoperative morbidity with deep neuromuscular blockade in laparoscopic surgery: a randomized controlled trial. Anesthesiology 2014; 120:1301–1309.

Hemmes SN, Gama de Abreu M, Pelosi P, Schultz MJ. PROVE Network Investigators. High versus low positive end-expiratory pressure during general anaesthesia for open abdominal surgery (PROVHILO trial). Lancet 2014; 384:495–503.

Article.ArticleTitle: Integrated lung-protective ventilation in laparoscopic colorectal surgery: beyond conventional protective strategies.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: From the Department of Anaesthesiology, Henan Provincial Chest Hospital (Chest Hospital of Zhengzhou University), Zhengzhou, Henan, China (JZ, WZ, GX).

Reference.Citation: Yan T, Li HX, Sun YL, et al. Preventing pulmonary complications after laparoscopic colorectal surgery: a lung-protective protocol vs. standard care. Eur J Anaesthesiol 2025; 42:1–14.
Kroenke K, Lawrence VA, Theroux JF, et al. Operative risk in patients with severe obstructive pulmonary disease. Arch Intern Med 1992; 152:967–971.
Jammer I, Wickboldt N, Sander M, et al. Standards for definitions and use of outcome measures for clinical effectiveness research in perioperative medicine. Eur J Anaesthesiol 2015; 32:88–105.
Park SK, Son YG, Yoo S, et al. Deep vs. moderate neuromuscular blockade during laparoscopic surgery: a systematic review and meta-analysis. Eur J Anaesthesiol 2018; 35:867–875.

Cho YJ, Paik H, Jeong SY, et al. Lower intra-abdominal pressure has no cardiopulmonary benefits during laparoscopic colorectal surgery: a double-blind, randomized controlled trial. Surg Endosc 2018; 32:4533–4542.

Gu WJ, Cen Y, Zhao FZ, et al. Association between driving pressure-guided ventilation and postoperative pulmonary complications in surgical patients: a meta-analysis with trial sequential analysis. Br J Anaesth 2024; 133:647–657.
Tuna ME, Akgün M. Preoperative pulmonary evaluation to prevent postoperative pulmonary complications. APS 2023; 1:34.
